sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45745" key="e)fhmio/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφημῐόλιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, less correct form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμιόλιος</foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.77</biblScope> </bibl> H., Bacch.Sen.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.106</biblScope> </bibl> Bellermann.</entryFree>
